executive_summary: Sprint 12 is progressing well with all major features on track. Timeline shows amber due to 2-day delay in API integration, but mitigation plan is in place. Two medium-level risks require monitoring.
key_achievements: Payment module UI completed and approved by product team
Security review completed with no critical findings
blockers_and_issues: API integration delayed by 2 days due to third-party documentation gaps
Waiting for client approval on reporting dashboard design

proposed_external_actions.action: Email weekly status report to steering committee
